name: Praedos
description: Orokin elites admired farmers in conquered regions, because they had learned to fight with modified farming tools despite being forbidden to own weapons. For their voyage, the Zariman were presented with Praedos in recognition of Zariman tenacity. The Void reinforces the strength of the spirited individual by fortifying the Praedos.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
The Laetum and the Praedos were released with this option enabled, it is now the Phenmor’s turn! 
Updated Praedos transformation Sound with Void FX.
Fixed the Praedos’ Evolution III challenge working on non-Thrax enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Orokin elites admired farmers in conquered regions, because they had learned to fight with modified farming tools despite being forbidden to own weapons. For their voyage, the Zariman were presented with Praedos in recognition of Zariman tenacity. The Void reinforces the strength of the spirited individual by fortifying the Praedos.
Praedos:
Praedos 
When there is any amount of charge (indicated by the meter in the reticle for the Phenmor and Laetum, and a FX pulse on the Praedos), Incarnon Transmutation can be activated by using alt fire (Phenmor and Laetum) or Heavy Attack (Praedos). That same meter will drain as you use the weapon in its Incarnon Transmutation.
